rationale: Educ. Code §48.2642 governs ADA adjustments and entitlement reductions for early high school graduates under the Texas First Scholarship Program. It has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value.
quote: the commissioner shall count toward a school district's or open-enrollment charter school's average daily attendance under Section 48.005 each student who graduates early from high school
_note: No conflict. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to this education funding provision.
